head: main

findings.triage_reason: Row 2 + regression_from_fix: --json --dry-run silently emits plain text instead of JSON — broke when DR-005 restructured the output branches
findings.finding: --json --dry-run output broken — JSON flag silently ignored, plain text emitted
findings.evidence: Line 426: `if json_output and not dry_run:` explicitly excludes dry-run from JSON. Old code had a JSON branch for dry-run chunks. Data is in result.dry_run_chunks but never serialized.
findings.fix: Add JSON output in the dry-run path: serialize dry_run_chunks as JSON array when --json is active.

findings.triage_reason: Regression from DR-004 fix: missing project silently skipped, user sees exit 0 with no stderr indication. Needs visible feedback.
findings.finding: Missing project field silently skipped — user sees zero output, exit 0, believes ingest succeeded
findings.evidence: Warning goes to file-only log by default. User runs `munin ingest`, sees 'Stored: 0', exit 0, no stderr. No indication source was dropped.
findings.fix: Add typer.echo to stderr when a source is skipped for missing project, OR add a post-run check in ingest_cmd: if files_scanned==0, echo a warning.

findings.triage_reason: Row 9: performance — embed called before fingerprint check wastes HTTP calls. Not a regression, pre-existing ordering choice.
findings.finding: embed_fn called BEFORE fingerprint SELECT — O(chunks) HTTP calls regardless of skip rate
findings.evidence: embed at line 171 fires before SELECT at 179. Unchanged chunks (skip at 197) still pay the embed cost.
findings.fix: Move embed_fn after the fingerprint check. Only embed when chunk is new or changed. Pass shared httpx.Client.

findings.triage_reason: Row 7: exit code inconsistency — dry-run zero chunks exits 0 vs import_cmd exits 1. Not a regression.
findings.finding: ingest_cmd dry-run with zero chunks exits 0 — no parity with import_cmd exit-code contract
findings.evidence: Empty dry_run_chunks skips output block, falls to else, exits 0.
findings.fix: After dry-run output, add: if chunks_would_store == 0: raise typer.Exit(code=1)

findings.triage_reason: Row 7: error leak — pre-existing, not from this diff. Convergence bias: followup.
findings.finding: traceback.print_exc() leaks full stack traces to MCP stderr
findings.evidence: MCP clients capture stderr. Traceback exposes paths, module names, psycopg internals.
findings.fix: Replace with logger.exception().

findings.triage_reason: Row 8: cross-project namespace exposure — pre-existing, single-user local tool. Convergence bias: followup.
findings.finding: list_projects() MCP tool returns all projects with no scoping
findings.evidence: All other tools scope to _project. list_projects returns full namespace.
findings.fix: Document as intentionally global, or add project filter.

findings.triage_reason: Row 8: hardcoded dev default password — pre-existing, matches docker-compose. Convergence bias: followup.
findings.finding: Default db_url contains plaintext password 'munin' in source
findings.evidence: config.py:15 hardcodes password. Same as docker-compose.yml.
findings.fix: Add startup warning when default password detected. Document env var override.

findings.triage_reason: Row 8: symlink escape in import_markdown — pre-existing, ingest.py already fixed. Convergence bias: followup.
findings.finding: _import_markdown has no symlink containment check unlike ingest.py
findings.evidence: ingest.py has containment at lines 91-98. import_markdown at 272 has no equivalent.
findings.fix: Add same containment check before frontmatter.load().

findings.triage_reason: Row 7: related to DR2-001 — empty dry-run + json also broken.
findings.finding: dry_run + json_output + empty chunks emits text, ignoring --json
findings.evidence: Falls through to else block which prints text.
findings.fix: Add JSON branch in else block.

findings.triage_reason: Row 9: implicit transaction — fragile but correct today.
findings.finding: DELETE + upsert relies on implicit psycopg3 transaction
findings.evidence: Correct with default autocommit=False, but fragile if config changes.
findings.fix: Wrap in explicit conn.transaction().

findings.triage_reason: Row 7: error handling gap on injected client.
findings.finding: Injected httpx.Client not guarded — closed client raises opaque error
findings.evidence: Closed client raises RuntimeError instead of MuninEmbedError.
findings.fix: Wrap in try/except for transport errors, re-raise as MuninEmbedError.

findings.triage_reason: Row 8: pre-existing — network errors not retried.
findings.finding: ConnectError/ReadTimeout raises immediately — not retried despite retry table
findings.evidence: Only HTTP 5xx triggers retry. Transient network errors fail fast.
findings.fix: Catch ConnectError/ReadTimeout in retry loop, continue to next attempt.

findings.triage_reason: Row 9: pre-existing — ThreadPoolExecutor shutdown mismatch.
findings.finding: ThreadPoolExecutor context manager calls shutdown(wait=True) — blocks on timed-out threads
findings.evidence: Retro claimed wait=False but context manager does wait=True.
findings.fix: Use explicit construction + shutdown(wait=False, cancel_futures=True).

findings.triage_reason: Row 7: pre-existing — import exits 1 on clean skip.
findings.finding: import_cmd exits code 1 when imported==0 even if all rows cleanly skipped
findings.evidence: No failures but exit 1 — misleading for scripting.
findings.fix: Only exit 1 when failed > 0.

findings.triage_reason: Row 7: pool.close() can shadow exceptions.
findings.finding: pool.close() in finally can shadow original exception on teardown failure
findings.evidence: Bare pool.close() — if it raises, original error is lost.
findings.fix: Wrap in try/except, log teardown error.

findings.triage_reason: Row 6: test-only — locks in pre-SELECT embed behavior.
findings.finding: test_unchanged_chunk_skipped asserts embed called once — locks in inefficient ordering
findings.evidence: Test will break if embed-after-SELECT fix is applied.
findings.fix: Fix together with DR2-003.

findings.triage_reason: Row 8: pre-existing ANSI injection risk.
findings.finding: JSONL import echoes raw line to terminal — potential ANSI injection
findings.evidence: First 80 chars of invalid line printed to stderr.
findings.fix: Use repr() to sanitize.

findings.triage_reason: Row 10: reviewer self-corrected — pool.close() on partially opened pool is safe per psycopg docs.
findings.finding: Pool.close() on partially constructed pool
findings.evidence: Reviewer confirmed safe per psycopg_pool contract.
findings.fix: No change needed.

findings.triage_reason: Row 10: reviewer self-corrected — SELECT, DELETE, upsert confirmed in same connection block.
findings.finding: SELECT and DELETE+upsert in separate connections (TOCTOU)
findings.evidence: Reviewer confirmed all ops are inside same pool.connection() block.
findings.fix: No change needed.

findings.triage_reason: Row 11: duplicate of run 1 dismiss DR-013.
findings.finding: dry_run_chunks list unbounded in memory
findings.evidence: Same as run 1.
findings.fix: Same as run 1.

summary: 2 block (both regressions from round 1 fixes), 16 followup (6 pre-existing security/infra, 10 new polish), 3 dismiss
